summary: Verification testing completed successfully. Critical calendar fix confirmed working. All 21 services, complete booking flow, and mobile responsiveness verified. Backend APIs maintain 100% success rate.
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (/api/) - 100% success
Get all 21 services (/api/services) - All services present
Get single service by ID - Working correctly
Get time slots for date (/api/time-slots) - 11 slots loading
Photo upload endpoint (/api/upload-photo) - Functional
Create booking (/api/bookings POST) - Successful creation
Get all bookings (/api/bookings GET) - Working
Get single booking by ID - Working
Home page hero section loads correctly
Services grid displays 8 services on home page
Services page displays all 21 services correctly
Navigation between pages (desktop and mobile)
Service cards clickable and navigate to booking
CRITICAL: Calendar component renders properly (fix verified)
Calendar date selection functionality working
Calendar month navigation working
Time slots load after date selection (11 slots)
Complete booking flow: Service → Date/Time → Photo → Details → Confirmation
Photo upload interface functional with skip option
Form validation on booking details step
Booking submission and confirmation page
Mobile responsive design - all features work
Mobile navigation menu functional
Calendar responsive on mobile (310px width)
